task_name: Unable to determine - not an FLS task
reason: The video shows manipulation of a blue paper/foam object with laparoscopic instruments on a training board, but this does not correspond to any of the five standard FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). The object appears to be being folded or shaped rather than transferred, cut precisely, looped, or sutured. Without clear task identification or evidence of standard FLS equipment (pegs, gauze, appendage, Penrose drain with marked suture points), this cannot be reliably scored against the official FLS rubric.
recommendation: Resubmit with clarification of the task being performed, or provide a video of a recognized FLS MISTELS task.
